name: AITPM Family Project Room
tagline: Invite an AI TPM into a family or friend group and get one shared project link.
thesis: Make project coordination feel like adding a trusted TPM to an existing group chat, then letting people connect calendars, email, files, and updates when they choose.
audience: Families, friend groups, community organizers, and lightweight project teams.
proofPoints: A single shared link becomes the living dashboard for the group.
People can join, connect accounts, and keep visibility scoped to the project.
The AI TPM asks clarifying questions before creating plans, reminders, and updates.
